summaryPatterns: I'm a Product Analyst with 3+ years of experience specializing in user behavior analysis, A/B testing, and product metrics optimization. Built ETL processes and dashboards serving 50+ stakeholders, reduced reporting time by 70%.

I'm a Senior Product Analyst (5+ years) focused on conversion funnel optimization and cohort analysis. Designed and analyzed 15+ A/B tests, increased product conversion rates by 15% and user retention by 25%.

I'm a Product Data Analyst with 4+ years experience in fintech and e-commerce. Built comprehensive BI dashboards reducing manual analytics time from 3 hours to 40 minutes, managed product metrics for MAU of 100K+ users.

I'm a Middle Product Analyst (3+ years) specializing in CJM analysis and product experimentation. Automated 80% of operational reports, reduced reaction time to metric anomalies from 24 to 6 hours through SQL alerting.
achievementPhrases: Reduced reporting time by 70% from 3 hours to 40 minutes through automation
Increased product conversion by 15% through funnel optimization
Built 30+ BI dashboards reducing ad-hoc requests by 70%
Improved user retention by 25% via cohort analysis insights
Reduced CAC by 20% through channel optimization analysis
Increased CTR by 25% and lead generation by 17% via user segmentation
Automated 80% of operational reports improving decision-making speed
Reduced metric anomaly reaction time from 24 to 6 hours with SQL alerts
Decreased manual operations by 40% through CRM automation
Improved onboarding efficiency reducing time-to-productivity by 40%
Optimized SQL queries reducing database load by 15%
Increased service coverage by 7 cities generating +15% revenue
Reduced cart abandonment by 23% through UX improvements
Conducted 15+ A/B tests with full cycle implementation
Built end-to-end marketing analytics dashboard consolidating 5+ data sources
Reduced customer support ticket volume by 20% through issue analysis
keyResponsibilities: Design and analyze A/B tests with statistical significance validation
Build and maintain product metrics dashboards and regular reporting
Conduct cohort analysis and customer journey mapping
Perform funnel analysis and conversion rate optimization
Develop ETL processes and data pipelines for product analytics
Collaborate with product teams on hypothesis generation and validation
Monitor key product metrics and set up alerting systems
Conduct ad-hoc analytical research to support product decisions
Analyze user behavior patterns and segmentation
Present analytical findings and recommendations to stakeholders
redFlags: Listing generic achievements without specific metrics or percentages
Claiming expertise in 30+ tools without depth in core analytics stack
No mention of A/B testing or statistical analysis experience
Focusing only on tool usage without business impact examples
Missing collaboration with product teams or stakeholder management
No experience with SQL or data manipulation
Vague descriptions like 'analyzed data' without specific methodologies
notes: Продуктовый аналитик — это специалист, который работает на стыке данных и продукта. Ключевые компетенции: глубокие знания SQL и Python для работы с данными, опыт A/B-тестирования с корректной статистической оценкой, умение строить дашборды и автоматизировать отчетность. Важно показать влияние на бизнес-метрики (конверсия, retention, LTV), опыт работы с продуктовыми командами и способность переводить данные в actionable insights. В резюме должны быть конкретные цифры достижений: сколько процентов улучшили конверсию, на сколько сократили время подготовки отчетов, сколько провели экспериментов. Популярные индустрии: финтех, e-commerce, маркетплейсы, delivery. Технический стек обычно включает SQL (ClickHouse/PostgreSQL), Python (pandas, scipy), BI-инструменты (Tableau, Superset), системы аналитики (Amplitude, Google Analytics). Важно упомянуть опыт работы с воронками, когортным анализом, юнит-экономикой и CJM.
